description_long: This is a male police officer dressed in a tactical SWAT uniform, featuring a blue long-sleeve shirt and matching pants with reinforced knee pads. He wears a black tactical vest with multiple pouches and the word 'SWAT' printed on the back, as well as a utility belt equipped with various gear. The officer is outfitted with black gloves, heavy-duty black boots, and a blue helmet with a black visor and integrated goggles. His uniform includes protective padding on the elbows and knees, and he has a radio and holstered equipment attached to his belt. The overall appearance is that of a well-equipped urban law enforcement officer prepared for high-risk operations.
description: A male SWAT police officer in a blue tactical uniform with a black vest, helmet, gloves, and utility belt, equipped for urban operations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's blue uniform, black tactical vest, gloves, helmet with visor, and utility belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the helmet profile, vest thickness, and equipment attached to the belt and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'SWAT' label on the vest, helmet back, and full view of the utility belt and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the helmet, vest, and additional belt equipment.
attribute_uniform_type: Tactical SWAT uniform with blue long-sleeve shirt and pants, black tactical vest with pouches, reinforced knee and elbow pads, black gloves, and heavy-duty boots.
attribute_headgear_style: Blue tactical helmet with black visor and integrated goggles
